calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-21-2017 Continued To Feb-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harry Oliver for Patricia Hom.

The Court informed Counsel that there is an issue with the Court confirming that the 1% general partnership interest in BPBH LP, and the BH Escondido Investors (the businesses) are assets of the Trust. Mr. Oliver stated that the Beneficiaries are the same, and that he believes an assignment of the 1% interest and a general assignment which includes everything was included in at least one of the petitions he filed. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to February 28, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be taken under submission on that date. If Counsel finds the general assignment for the current operating Trust and it goes beyond the property that is in attachment A, he can file it and the Court will take a look at it.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Continued To Nov-21-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Oliver, for petitioner Patricia Hom.

Mr. Oliver reported that his response to the examiner's notes is 90% complete, and requested a continuance of the hearing for one month to complete and file the response and have time for the examiner to review it. The matter was continued to November 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
